_comment: Model-weight metadata. Weights are hosted on the Hugging Face Hub repo set in oncosplice.weights.HF_REPO_ID (override with $ONCOSPLICE_HF_REPO), one sub-folder per model. `subfolder` defaults to the model name; set `repo_id` to override the repo for a single model. `license`/`attribution` document the provenance of the *trained weights* (the architecture code in oncosplice is independently MIT-licensed or vendored MIT).

openspliceai.description: OpenSpliceAI (PyTorch port of SpliceAI) — 5-model ensemble, 10000nt MANE-trained weights.

spliceai_pytorch.description: SpliceAI weights translated Keras→PyTorch, run in oncosplice's plain-ReLU SpliceAI architecture. Numerically equivalent to the original Keras SpliceAI.

spliceai_keras.description: SpliceAI original Keras/TF weights (Jaganathan et al. 2019) — 5-model ensemble. Reference/verification only.

pangolin.description: Pangolin — 40 PyTorch models (8 indices × 5 ensemble members), multi-tissue GTEx-trained. Run via oncosplice's independent (MIT) re-implementation of the Pangolin architecture.
pangolin.attribution: Pangolin weights © Zeng & Li 2022, GPL-3.0. The oncosplice architecture code is an independent MIT re-implementation; weights are redistributed for non-commercial research use under their original GPL-3.0 terms.
pangolin.expected_files: final.{j}.{i}.3 for i in 0..7, j in 1..5 (40 files)

spliceformer.description: Spliceformer — 40k-context transformer ensemble (Jónsson et al. Comms Bio 2024). Model definition is vendored (MIT) in oncosplice.
